compiled_state.title: GREEN: Create check-shim-refs.sh detection script
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Create plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh. 3 patterns, hooks/lib exclusion, scripts/ exclusion (default mode only), per-line shim-exempt, exit 0/1, chmod +x.

comments.body:
I notice that no ticket details were provided in your request. The "TICKET:" section is empty, so I cannot determine what changes are being requested or what files would be affected.

Please provide the ticket description/details so I can analyze what source and test files would most likely need modification.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x)
- [ ] Detects 3 violation patterns: literal plugins/dso/scripts/, $PLUGIN_SCRIPTS/, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/
- [ ] Excludes source commands targeting hooks/lib/ (not violations)
- [ ] Excludes files within plugins/dso/scripts/ directory (script-to-script refs, default mode only)
- [ ] Honors # shim-exempt: <reason> exemption comments (case-insensitive)
- [ ] Exits 0 when no violations found, exits 1 when violations detected
- [ ] Accepts file path args for targeted scans; defaults to full in-scope set when no args
- [ ] RED tests in test-check-shim-refs.sh and test-check-shim-refs-detection.sh turn GREEN
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Superseded by 9e90-bf48 — both tasks create the same file (check-shim-refs.sh). Closing as duplicate.
comments.author: Test
